languages.text: То ли автоматон Легио Кибернетика, то ли саркофаг для пилота. И все равно вам кажется, будто бы он следит за вами.
This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.
languages.original_text: То ли автоматон Легио Кибернетика, то ли саркофаг для пилота. И все равно вам кажется, будто бы он следит за вами.

traits.locale_text: This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.
This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.
This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.

languages.text: 这要么是智控军团的自动机器人，要么就是飞行员的石棺。而不知为何，你还是觉得它在盯着你。
languages.original_text: This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.

traits.locale_text: 这要么是智控军团的自动机器人，要么就是飞行员的石棺。而不知为何，你还是觉得它在盯着你。

languages.text: Estás ante un autómata de la Legio Cybernetica o un sarcófago de piloto. Sea lo que sea, sientes que te observa.
languages.original_text: This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.

traits.locale_text: Estás ante un autómata de la Legio Cybernetica o un sarcófago de piloto. Sea lo que sea, sientes que te observa.

languages.text: Il s'agit soit d'un automate de la Legio Cybernetica soit d'un sarcophage de pilote. Et pourtant, vous avez l'impression qu'il vous observe...
languages.original_text: This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.

traits.locale_text: Il s'agit soit d'un automate de la Legio Cybernetica soit d'un sarcophage de pilote. Et pourtant, vous avez l'impression qu'il vous observe...

languages.text: Bu ya bir Legio Sibernetika otomatı ya da bir pilotun lahdi. Yine de sanki seni izliyormuş gibi hissediyorsun.
languages.original_text: This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.

traits.locale_text: Bu ya bir Legio Sibernetika otomatı ya da bir pilotun lahdi. Yine de sanki seni izliyormuş gibi hissediyorsun.

languages.text: Das ist ein Automaton der Legio Cybernetica oder der Sarcophagus eines Piloten. Und doch hast du das Gefühl, als würde er dich beobachten.
languages.original_text: This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.

traits.locale_text: Das ist ein Automaton der Legio Cybernetica oder der Sarcophagus eines Piloten. Und doch hast du das Gefühl, als würde er dich beobachten.

languages.text: これはレギオ・サイバーネティカのオートマトンか、パイロットの棺だろう。それでも、こちらを見ているような気がする。
languages.original_text: This is either a Legio Cybernetica automaton or a pilot's sarcophagus. And, still, you feel as though it is watching you.

traits.locale_text: これはレギオ・サイバーネティカのオートマトンか、パイロットの棺だろう。それでも、こちらを見ているような気がする。
